name_en: Premium Original Leather M23955 M23947 Black Black Warrior (Gun Buckle)
name_cn:
Premium Original Leather M23955 M23947 Black Black Warrior (Gun Buckle)
Featuring exquisite cowhide leather and matte metal hardware to convey a modern attitude, this new horizontal design brings together classic elements from the same series. The KHl adjustable woven chain allows for shoulder or crossbody wear, making it a trendy choice for carrying essentials like a phone and card case.
Dimensions: 22.0 x 12.0 x 8.0
